creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 208332
py-pillow-6.2.0.patch

Hi Kubilay,

attached is the patch that updates graphics/py-pillow to 6.2.0. Previous releases <= 6.1.0 are vulnerable with a medium exploitation score (see CVE-2019-16865 and the GitHub issue for further info).

QA:
~~
poudriere (11.3-RELEASE amd64) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK

Will do the usual QA in the next few hours and update this PR then. An entry for the VuXML will follow shortly.
